---
name: Integration Blocker
about: Flag a blocker between frontend, backend, Supabase, deployment, or CI.
title: "blocker: "
labels: "integration, blocker, needs-triage"
assignees: ''

---

## Blocker Summary

What is blocked?

## Systems Involved

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Supabase Auth
- [ ] Supabase Database/RLS
- [ ] Supabase Edge Function
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] CI/CD

## Current Evidence

Add logs, screenshots, request/response samples, failing checks, or reproduction steps. Remove secrets and real user data.

## Expected Integration Contract

What did the other system expect?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Owner Needed

- [ ] Frontend owner
- [ ] Backend owner
- [ ] Database/Supabase owner
- [ ] Deployment/CI owner

## Urgency

- [ ] Blocks a release
- [ ] Blocks a PR
- [ ] Blocks local development
- [ ] Needs clarification but has a workaround
